text.title: AI Over-Reliance Self-Audit Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid AI Over-Reliance Self-Audit output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

required.field: 3 modules with action read|rewrite|delete, scheduled date

forbidden.pattern: recovery_plan picks ≥6 modules — too many to execute solo per quarter
audit skipped >120 days with no log entry
blast_radius_map empty AND ≥50% code is AI-generated

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: blast_radius_map populated with a typed value
rubber_stamp_inventory populated with a typed value
rubber_stamp_pct populated with a typed value
recovery_plan populated with a typed value
audit_date populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
